problem id: 899b479d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(3) OR NOT SHR(1)

examples:
  10000011 -> 10111110
  00010110 -> 11110110
  11101101 -> 10011101
  10001011 -> 10111011
  00101101 -> 11101101
  10100010 -> 10111110
  00001001 -> 11111011
  10111111 -> 10110111

query: 01000110
predicted answer: 11011100
